Professor • Computer Arch • Systems Builder

I am an Associate Professor and Y. T. Lo Faculty Fellow in Electrical and Computer Engineering, and an affiliated Associate Professor in Computer Science at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (UIUC). I lead the Systems Platform and Intelligence Lab (Illinois PlatformX). I received my Ph.D. in Computer Science from Georgia Tech in August 2017. My Ph.D. dissertation received the College of Computing Dissertation Award at Georgia Tech.

Most recently, I am super excited to build sustainable AI infrastructures and platforms with computer architecture and system techniques to accelerate AI-driven knowledge retrieval, discovery, and generation. Our recent research received MICRO Best Paper Runner Up in 2024, IEEE Micro Top Picks and MICRO Best Artifact Award in 2025. We also organized the Workshop on Hot Topics in System Infrastructure (HotInfra'23 and HotInfra'24).

I have also been working on memory and storage systems, with a focus on their access Interface, architecture Specialization, and development Approaches (the ISA of memory and storage systems). My research received the inaugural ACM SIGMICRO Early Career Award, NSF CAREER Award, NSF CRII Award, Dean's Award for Early Innovation, IEEE Micro Top Picks, USENIX Best Paper Award, and a few industry awards. Some of them have been transferred into products and featured by popular media agencies.

Research • 07/15/2023

Award • 10/23/2025

Our ReGate work received the Best Artifact Award at MICRO'25!

Publication • 09/18/2025

Two of our recent studies TeraIO and EngDesign will appear at NeurIPS'25!

Publication • 07/15/2025

Our GoFS built for managing scalable direct storage accesses for GPUs will appear at SOSP'25!

Publication • 07/14/2025

Two of our recent studies on AI chips: ReGate and ELK will appear at MICRO'25!

Talk • 05/12/2025

I will give a keynote talk at the AI4Sys 2025 workshop!

Talk • 03/02/2025

I'm honored to give a keynote talk at the 16th Annual Non-Volatile Memories Workshop!

Publication • 03/01/2025

Our research on CXL-based SSDs (SkyByte) is presented at HPCA'25!

Award • 02/15/2025

Our NPU virtualization work was selected as one of the IEEE Micro Top Picks!

Systems Platform and Intelligence Lab

Our research interests lie in the areas of computer systems and architecture, with a recent focus on AI infrastructure, AI systems, AI chip design, intelligent operating systems, AI for architecture and systems. We enjoy building both hardware and software systems. Our lab consists of graduate and undergraduate students from both CS and ECE departments. The lab was established at UIUC in early 2018 as the "System Platform Research Group". In early 2026, we rename the lab as "Systems Platform and Intelligence Lab (Illinois PlatformX)" to reflect our new missions.
